summary: Phase 2 Fleet/Company end-to-end verified. BACKEND: 8/8 pytest passed (test_iter35_fleet_phase2.py). Verified (1) self_accept records assigned_company_id/assigned_driver_id (==demo-driver id)/assigned_vehicle_id(null when no fleet vehicle attached), order.status=accepted, driver_id=demo-driver; (2) owner_assign mode: POST /api/orders/{id}/accept by a company driver returns 403 ('Self-accept is disabled. Your company owner assigns jobs.') and POST /api/company/jobs/{order_id}/assign succeeds with {success:true, driver_id, vehicle_id} and order persisted as status=accepted in /api/company/jobs; (3) GET /api/company/jobs owner-only -> 200 returns {jobs:[{id,order_number,status,pickup,dropoff,earnings,distance_km,driver_id,driver_name,vehicle_id,vehicle_reg,created_at,completed_at},...], stats:{total,active,completed,completed_earnings}}; non-owner driver gets 403; (4) vehicle audit: after POST /api/company/vehicles + /assign on owner-driver, the next self-accepted order records assigned_vehicle_id == the new vehicle id and /company/jobs shows vehicle_reg matching. FRONTEND: logged in as demo driver, /fleet renders Drivers (1) / Vehicles (1) / Jobs (N) tabs. Jobs tab shows stats row (Active / Completed / Earned) and JobCards (order_number, pickup → dropoff, 'by Demo Driver', Accepted status, €earnings). Drivers + Vehicles tabs still functional (add-driver-btn & add-vehicle-btn visible). LOCALIZATION (FI): with @nadaruns_language=fi, /fleet renders 'Kalusto', 'TYÖN HYVÄKSYNTÄTAPA', 'Kuljettaja hyväksyy itse', 'Kuljettajat (1)', 'Ajoneuvot (1)', 'Työt (8)', 'Aktiiviset', 'Valmiit', 'Ansaittu' — NO raw i18n keys leaked (fleet.tabJobs, fleet.jobsActiveLabel, etc. absent from DOM).

react_native_issues.issue: Pre-existing console warning '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' (carried over from iter33/34).
Pre-existing console warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'.
Pre-existing warning '[expo-notifications] Listening to push token changes is not yet fully supported on web.' — informational, expected on web preview.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 7620 lines — splitting into routers per domain (auth/driver/shipper/orders/fleet/wallet/admin) is overdue.

POST /api/orders/seed-new-pending is unauthenticated and *deletes all* existing pending orders before inserting one — fine for demo, but document it / restrict to non-prod. Tests use /api/orders/add-pending instead to avoid wiping shared state.

Owner-assign endpoint at /api/company/jobs/{order_id}/assign correctly enforces owner role, validates pending status, persists assigned_company_id/assigned_driver_id/assigned_vehicle_id, and emits audit + shipper push — solid.
accept_order(): job-mode + fleet recording logic is concise and race-safe (still uses conditional update on status==pending).
GET /api/company/jobs returns enriched driver_name / vehicle_reg via two batched lookups — good. Limit is 200; consider pagination when fleets scale.
frontend/app/fleet.tsx is now ~978 lines — consider extracting DriverCard / VehicleCard / JobCard / AddDriverModal / AddVehicleModal into /app/frontend/src/components/fleet/.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of Phase-2 fleet flows verified (EN + FI)

seed_data_creation: Company 'TEST_NadaFleet_Phase2' (owner demo.driver) created in this run and retained — currently has 8+ accepted orders attributed to demo driver (from add-pending + self-accept loops). Mode reset to self_accept at end. A throwaway fleet driver (test_phase2_<uuid>@nadafleet.test) and a TEST<hex> vehicle were created and DELETED inside the tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Demo driver owns 'TEST_NadaFleet_Phase2' (job_acceptance_mode=self_accept). To verify FI locale on web, set localStorage['@nadaruns_language']='fi' then reload. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter35_fleet_phase2.py (uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL). API note: POST /api/auth/login returns token under key 'token' (not 'access_token'); POST /api/company expects {company_name}; POST /api/company/drivers expects {first_name,last_name,email,password,phone?}; POST /api/company/vehicles returns {vehicle:{...}}; GET /api/company/vehicles returns {vehicles:[...]}; vehicle unassign is POST /api/company/vehicles/{id}/unassign (not DELETE /assign). Fleet testIDs: tab-drivers, tab-vehicles, tab-jobs, add-driver-btn, add-vehicle-btn.
